description: Windows desktop overlay app that monitors AI coding agent sessions (Claude Code, Codex) and displays their state as a floating overlay. Built with Tauri 2.0 (Rust + React).

tasks.title: Core Infrastructure: System Tray + Event Bridge
tasks.description: Combined Phase 0 task: Add system tray with context menu AND establish Tauri event communication. These are foundational - without both, no other feature can be demoed or tested.
steps: Add tauri-plugin-tray dependency to Cargo.toml
Configure tray icon in tauri.conf.json
Create tray icon asset (16x16 .ico)
Implement tray setup in lib.rs with context menu items (Show/Hide, Start/Stop monitoring, Quit)
Add tauri::AppHandle to Tauri managed state
Create Rust event types in new events.rs module: SessionStart, SessionEnd, StateChange
Implement event emission functions in events.rs
Create useAgentEvents React hook that listens to Tauri events via @tauri-apps/api/event
Wire up the hook in App.tsx to dispatch to Zustand store
Handle Show/Hide toggle to control overlay visibility via tray
Handle Quit to gracefully shut down the app
Test: tray icon appears, right-click shows menu, emit test event from backend, verify frontend store updates

tasks.title: Demo/Mock Mode - REMOVED
tasks.description: DELETED: Demo mode was removed to simplify the codebase. Testing should be done with real Claude Code hooks.

tasks.title: Named Pipe Server Foundation
tasks.description: Implement async Named Pipe server (\\.\pipe\VibeIsland) for receiving agent events. This is the primary communication channel for the Agent SDK to push session state.
steps: Add tokio dependency to Cargo.toml
Create src-tauri/src/pipe_server.rs with async pipe listener
Define AgentEvent struct: { session_id, state, payload } with serde
Implement pipe connection accept loop with JSON message parsing
CRITICAL: Use tokio::spawn for each connection to handle multiple concurrent clients (Claude Code + Codex running simultaneously)
Implement connection cleanup on client disconnect
Forward parsed events to Tauri event system via AppHandle
Start pipe server in Tauri setup hook
Add IPC command to check pipe server status
Test: use multiple simple clients to send JSON events concurrently and verify frontend updates

tasks.title: Process Watcher - Agent Detection via Process Polling
tasks.description: Enumerate running processes to detect known AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex CLI) and track their lifecycle. This serves as a fallback state detection mechanism.
steps: Add windows Win32_System_Threading feature to windows crate
Create src-tauri/src/process_watcher.rs
Implement process enumeration using EnumProcesses / CreateToolhelp32Snapshot
Match processes by known agent binary names (claude, codex, etc.)
Track process start/stop events, emit as Tauri events
Poll on a configurable interval (default: 5s)
Add IPC commands: start_process_watcher, stop_process_watcher, get_detected_processes
Test: start a known agent process, verify detection in overlay

tasks.title: Frontend - Approval Panel Component
tasks.description: Create an ApprovalPanel component that displays approval requests from agents with action buttons. When an agent needs user approval, this panel shows the details and allows approve/reject.
steps: Create frontend/src/components/ApprovalPanel.tsx
Display approval request details (session label, action description, risk level)
Add Approve and Reject action buttons with loading states
Emit approval response back to backend via Tauri invoke
Add IPC command in commands.rs to handle approval responses
Style the panel to match existing overlay design (glassmorphism, animations)
Add keyboard shortcuts for quick approval (Enter) and rejection (Escape)
Test: trigger PermissionRequest approval event, verify panel shows and buttons respond

tasks.title: Window Focus Management
tasks.description: Implement cross-application window focus. Allow users to click a session in the overlay to bring the corresponding agent terminal/editor window to the foreground.
steps: Add required Win32 features (Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging, Win32_System_Threading)
Create src-tauri/src/window_focus.rs
Implement find_window_by_pid using EnumWindows + GetWindowThreadProcessId
Implement focus_window with fallback strategy:
- Primary: SetForegroundWindow directly
- Fallback 1: AttachThreadInput + SetForegroundWindow (steal focus)
- Fallback 2: FlashWindowEx to flash taskbar if focus steal blocked by Windows 10/11
- Fallback 3: ShowWindow(SW_RESTORE) if window is minimized
Add IPC command focus_session_window(session_pid) in commands.rs
Wire up session click in Overlay.tsx to call focus command
Test: click session in overlay, corresponding terminal window comes to front

tasks.title: DPI & Multi-Monitor Support
tasks.description: Handle per-monitor DPI scaling and multi-monitor setups. Overlay position calculation must work correctly across displays with different DPIs. Without this, overlay appears offset on high-DPI or multi-monitor configurations.
steps: Add Win32_UI_HiDpi features to windows crate
Implement GetDpiForWindow and GetScaleFactorForMonitor wrappers
Store DPI scale factor with each overlay position
Update overlay position calculation to account for DPI
Handle monitor change events (WM_DPICHANGED, WM_DISPLAYCHANGE)
Test on multi-monitor setup with different DPIs
Test on 150% and 200% scaling
Verify overlay snaps to correct positions after DPI change

tasks.title: Agent SDK - Node.js (Claude Code)
tasks.description: Create a lightweight Node.js SDK that injects into Claude Code sessions and communicates with Vibe Island via Named Pipe. Publishes session lifecycle events.
steps: Create agent-sdk/node/ directory with package.json
Implement Named Pipe client using net.connect to \\.\pipe\VibeIsland
Define event types matching backend AgentEvent schema
Hook into Claude Code lifecycle: session start, state changes, session end
Add TypeScript type definitions
Add README with usage instructions and API documentation
Add npm publish configuration (package.json scripts, .npmignore)
Test: load SDK in a Node.js script, verify events appear in Vibe Island overlay
Create installation tarball for local testing: npm pack

tasks.title: Agent SDK - Python (Codex CLI)
tasks.description: Create a lightweight Python SDK for Codex CLI that communicates with Vibe Island via Named Pipe. Mirrors the Node.js SDK functionality.
steps: Create agent-sdk/python/ directory with pyproject.toml
Implement Named Pipe client using win32pipe / ctypes
Define event types matching backend AgentEvent schema
Hook into Codex CLI lifecycle events
Add README with usage instructions and API documentation
Add pip install configuration (setup.py or pyproject.toml)
Test: run SDK in a Python script, verify events appear in Vibe Island overlay
Create distribution package: python -m build

tasks.title: UI Polish and Production Readiness
tasks.description: Polish the entire overlay UI with smooth transitions, proper animations, error states, and ensure production build works correctly.
steps: Add CSS transitions for panel expand/collapse animation
Add smooth state change animations (color transitions on StatusDot)
Add error/loading states in the overlay UI
Ensure transparent background works correctly in WebView2
Verify overlay click-through toggle works smoothly
Run npm run lint && npm run build - no errors
Run cargo tauri build - production build succeeds
Test full end-to-end flow with real Claude Code hooks
Verify all features work on Windows 10 and Windows 11

tasks.title: Claude Code Integration via HTTP Hooks
tasks.description: Integrate with Claude Code using its native Hooks system. Claude Code supports HTTP hooks that POST JSON to a local server on lifecycle events. Session tracking now uses session_id field properly.
steps: Fix session_id extraction from hook payloads (use session_id field, not transcript_path)
Add SessionStart hook handler to properly create new sessions
Handle UserPromptSubmit hook for session resume detection
Map hook events to correct overlay states per session
Handle multiple concurrent Claude Code sessions (different terminals)
Use cwd to generate meaningful session labels (project name)
Test with multiple Claude Code instances running simultaneously

tasks.title: Claude Code Hook Configuration Guide
tasks.description: Create user documentation for configuring Claude Code hooks. Users only need to add a few lines to .claude/settings.json - no SDK installation required.
steps: Document hook configuration in README.md
Create example .claude/settings.json with all hook endpoints
Add setup instructions for first-time users
Include troubleshooting section
Test documentation with fresh Claude Code installation

tasks.title: Named Pipe SDK Support (Optional Fallback)
tasks.description: Maintain Named Pipe + Agent SDK as an optional fallback for non-Claude Code agents (Codex CLI, custom tools). HTTP Hooks are the primary integration for Claude Code, but Named Pipe remains useful for other tools.
steps: Keep existing Named Pipe server running on \\.\pipe\VibeIsland
Document Agent SDK usage for non-Claude Code tools
Test with custom Node.js/Python scripts
Note: Claude Code users should prefer HTTP Hooks (Task 11)

tasks.title: Diff Viewer - Approval Panel Enhancement
tasks.description: Add code diff preview to the Approval Panel, showing what changes the agent is proposing before user approves. Uses PreToolUse hook data for real tool preview.
steps: Add diff field to ApprovalRequest type
Create DiffViewer component with +/- line highlighting
Add syntax highlighting (optional)
Style: red background for deletions, green for additions
Integrate with PreToolUse hook data for real-time diff preview
Test with PermissionRequest fixtures containing diff data

tasks.title: Production Build and Distribution
tasks.description: Prepare for production release: build installer, configure code signing, test on clean Windows machines, create release documentation.
steps: Run cargo tauri build - verify production build succeeds
Apply EV code signing certificate with signtool
Verify SmartScreen does not show warning after signing
Test installer on Windows 10 and Windows 11
Create user documentation (README with screenshots)
Add version number and update mechanism
Create GitHub release with signed installer

tasks.title: Session Management Fix - Proper Session Tracking
tasks.description: Fix the core issue where all Claude Code conversations are mixed together. Each terminal/session should appear as a separate entry in the overlay.
steps: Update hook_server.rs to use session_id from Claude Code hooks
Add SessionStart hook endpoint (/hooks/session-start)
Add UserPromptSubmit hook endpoint (/hooks/user-prompt-submit)
Update frontend useAgentEvents.ts to handle new event structure
Update sessions store to properly track sessions by session_id
Generate session labels from cwd (project folder name)
Handle session cleanup when Claude Code exits
Test: run multiple Claude Code instances, verify each appears as separate session

tasks.title: Fix Approval Panel Window Height
tasks.description: When approval request appears, the overlay window does not resize properly to show the approval buttons. Users cannot see or click the approve/reject buttons.
steps: Calculate correct approval panel height in Overlay.tsx
Account for diff viewer height when present
Base approval panel height: ~180px
With diff viewer: add ~220px (max-height)
Test: trigger approval request, verify window expands to show all buttons

tasks.title: Implement Real Approval Flow via PermissionRequest Hook
tasks.description: Current approval system only displays approval requests but does NOT actually block tool execution. PreToolUse hook returns 200 OK immediately, allowing tools to execute without waiting for user approval. Need to implement proper approval flow using Claude Code's PermissionRequest hook.
steps: Add PermissionRequest hook endpoint (/hooks/permission-request)
Parse permission_suggestions from hook payload
Store pending approval request with tool_use_id for correlation
Wait for user approval/rejection from frontend
Return JSON response with permissionDecision (allow/deny/ask)
Update ApprovalPanel to show actual permission request details
Handle approval timeout (default: 30s)
Test: trigger a Bash command that requires permission, verify approval panel blocks execution until user responds

tasks.title: Approval Response Correlation System
tasks.description: Implement a system to correlate user approval responses with the original PermissionRequest hook calls. This requires storing pending requests and matching responses.
steps: Create pending_approvals storage in hook_server.rs (Mutex<HashMap>)
Store tool_use_id, session_id, and timestamp for each pending request
Implement approval waiting mechanism (async channel or condition variable)
Match submit_approval_response to pending request by session_id
Clean up expired pending requests (timeout cleanup)
Add IPC command to get pending approvals status
Test: multiple concurrent approval requests, verify each response matches correct request

tasks.title: Update Hook Configuration Documentation
tasks.description: Update hooks-setup.md to include PermissionRequest hook configuration. Users need to add this hook to their .claude/settings.json for approval flow to work.
steps: Add PermissionRequest hook to example settings.json
Document the approval flow behavior
Explain how Vibe Island intercepts and processes permission requests
Add troubleshooting for approval not working
Test: fresh Claude Code setup with new hook config, verify approval works

tasks.title: 调研 macOS 灵动岛动画实现方案
tasks.description: 调研 macOS 灵动岛(Dynamic Island)的动画效果实现方案，包括：动画类型、过渡效果、弹性动画参数、系统级动画API。为 Vibe Island 的动画设计提供参考。
steps: 研究 macOS Dynamic Island 的动画类型（展开/收缩/状态切换）
分析弹性动画参数（阻尼、刚度、质量）
研究 Core Animation API 的弹簧动画实现
记录关键动画时长和曲线参数
整理可借鉴的动画设计模式

tasks.title: 调研 Windows 窗口管理方案
tasks.description: 调研 Windows 平台的窗口管理方案，包括：Win32 窗口层级管理、多显示器支持、窗口状态同步、与其他应用的窗口交互、点击穿透与交互模式切换的最佳实践。
steps: 研究 Win32 窗口层级 API（SetWindowPos, Z-order）
分析多显示器场景下的窗口定位策略
研究窗口状态同步机制
分析点击穿透与交互模式切换的实现方式
整理 Windows 10/11 的窗口管理最佳实践

tasks.title: 制定 Vibe Island 实际落地技术方案
tasks.description: 基于调研结果，制定 Vibe Island 的实际落地技术方案，包括：动画系统架构、Win32 动画实现方式、性能优化策略、与现有 Tauri 架构的集成方式。
steps: 整合 macOS 动画调研结果
整合 Windows 窗口管理调研结果
设计动画系统架构（前后端分工）
确定 Win32 动画实现方式（定时器/动画API）
制定性能优化策略
设计 Tauri 集成方案
输出完整技术方案文档

tasks.title: 添加 Framer Motion 动画依赖
tasks.description: 在 frontend 项目中添加 Framer Motion 依赖，配置动画参数常量文件。
steps: npm install framer-motion
创建 frontend/src/config/animation.ts 配置文件
定义弹簧动画参数（stiffness, damping, mass）
定义缓动曲线常量
定义动画时长常量
验证依赖安装成功

tasks.title: 实现 AnimatedOverlay 组件
tasks.description: 创建支持弹簧动画的 Overlay 组件，包含展开/收缩动画和 IPC 尺寸同步。
steps: 创建 frontend/src/components/AnimatedOverlay.tsx
实现展开/收缩动画 variants
添加 onUpdate 回调同步窗口尺寸
实现 useThrottledCallback hook（16ms 节流）
集成到现有 Overlay.tsx
测试动画流畅性

tasks.title: 实现后端 update_overlay_size 命令
tasks.description: 在 Rust 后端实现 update_overlay_size IPC 命令，包含节流检查和 Win32 SetWindowPos 调用。
steps: 在 commands.rs 添加 update_overlay_size 命令
实现节流检查（16ms 最小间隔）
调用 SetWindowPos 更新窗口尺寸
添加错误处理
注册命令到 Tauri builder
测试 IPC 调用正确性

tasks.title: 实现点击穿透自动切换
tasks.description: 根据 Overlay 状态自动切换点击穿透模式：紧凑状态启用穿透，展开状态禁用穿透。
steps: 扩展 set_click_through 函数
添加 update_interactive_mode 命令
前端在状态变化时调用命令
处理审批请求时的强制交互模式
测试点击穿透切换正确性

tasks.title: 实现 StatusDot 状态动画
tasks.description: 为状态指示点添加动画效果：颜色过渡动画、思考状态的脉动动画。
steps: 更新 StatusDot.tsx 使用 Framer Motion
实现颜色过渡动画
实现思考状态的 scale 脉动动画
添加动画配置参数
测试各状态动画效果

tasks.title: 实现 Windows 11 圆角窗口
tasks.description: 使用 DWM API 为 Overlay 窗口设置圆角，匹配灵动岛视觉效果。
steps: 在 overlay.rs 添加 set_rounded_corners 函数
使用 DWMWA_WINDOW_CORNER_PREFERENCE 属性
在窗口创建时调用圆角设置
处理 Windows 10 兼容性（不支持时静默失败）
测试圆角显示效果

tasks.title: 动画性能优化
tasks.description: 优化动画性能，确保 60fps 流畅度和低 CPU 占用。
steps: 添加 CSS will-change 提示 GPU 加速
使用 transform 替代 width/height（如可行）
优化 IPC 调用频率
添加性能监控日志
测试动画帧率和 CPU 占用

tasks.title: 动画系统测试和文档
tasks.description: 编写动画系统测试用例，更新项目文档。
steps: 编写前端动画组件测试
编写后端 IPC 命令测试
测试多显示器场景
测试高 DPI 场景
更新 AGENTS.md 添加动画系统说明
更新 progress.txt 记录开发进度

tasks.title: Hook Server 健康监控
tasks.description: 添加心跳检测机制，前端显示连接状态（已连接/断开/错误），自动重连逻辑，错误日志面板。
steps: 在 hook_server.rs 添加心跳检测机制
定义 HookConnectionState 枚举: connected, disconnected, error
前端添加 HookStatus 组件显示连接状态（绿/红/灰）
实现自动重连逻辑（指数退避）
添加错误日志存储和展示
添加 IPC 命令: get_hook_health, get_hook_errors, clear_hook_errors
测试: 模拟 Hook server 断开，验证前端状态更新

tasks.title: Hook 事件增强
tasks.description: 新增 thinking、error、streaming 状态，添加工具执行耗时统计。
steps: 扩展 AgentState 枚举: thinking, streaming, error
解析 Claude Code hook 事件映射到新状态
添加工具执行开始时间记录
计算工具执行耗时并显示
前端状态切换添加动画过渡
更新 StatusDot 组件支持新状态颜色
测试: 验证各状态正确显示

tasks.title: Session 详情面板
tasks.description: 点击 session 展开详情，显示完整 cwd 路径、创建时间、最近活动时间、工具执行历史。
steps: 创建 SessionDetail 组件
显示 session 基本信息（cwd, 创建时间, 最近活动）
添加工具执行历史列表（最近 10 条）
显示当前工具信息（名称、输入、耗时）
添加折叠/展开动画
集成到 Overlay 组件
测试: 点击 session 验证详情面板显示

tasks.title: Session 分组与搜索
tasks.description: 按项目（cwd）分组，按状态筛选，搜索框，排序选项。
steps: 实现按 cwd 分组逻辑
添加状态筛选下拉（running/idle/approval）
添加搜索框（按 label 搜索）
添加排序选项（最近活动/创建时间）
更新 SessionList 组件支持分组显示
添加分组折叠功能
测试: 多个项目 session 验证分组和筛选

tasks.title: Session 持久化
tasks.description: 保存 session 历史到本地，重启后恢复 session 列表，清理过期 session。
steps: 定义 session 持久化格式
后端添加 save_sessions / load_sessions 命令
应用启动时加载历史 sessions
定期保存 sessions 到文件
实现过期清理逻辑（7 天无活动）
前端恢复 session 列表状态
测试: 重启应用验证 session 恢复

tasks.title: 工具执行详情
tasks.description: 显示工具输入参数（可折叠）、输出摘要、执行耗时、错误信息高亮。
steps: 扩展 ToolExecution 类型包含完整信息
创建 ToolExecutionDetail 组件
显示工具输入参数（JSON 格式化）
显示工具输出摘要（截断处理）
错误信息红色高亮显示
添加折叠/展开功能
测试: 验证工具详情正确显示

tasks.title: 活动时间线
tasks.description: 记录所有工具调用，时间线视图展示，点击可查看详情，支持导出日志。
steps: 创建 ActivityTimeline 组件
按时间顺序显示工具调用
每个条目显示: 时间、工具名、状态、耗时
点击条目展开详情
添加导出日志按钮（JSON/Markdown）
添加时间范围筛选
测试: 多次工具调用验证时间线

tasks.title: Hook 自动配置 - 启动检查与配置
tasks.description: 软件启动时自动检查 Claude Code Hook 配置是否存在，如不存在则自动配置。支持用户级 (~/.claude/settings.json) 和项目级 (.claude/settings.json) 配置。
steps: 创建 src-tauri/src/hook_config.rs 模块
实现 check_hook_config 命令 - 检查 settings.json 中是否包含 Vibe Island hooks
实现 install_hooks 命令 - 读取现有 settings.json，合并 Vibe Island hooks，创建备份
实现 get_hook_config_status 命令 - 返回配置状态（已配置/未配置/部分配置）
在 lib.rs setup 中调用 check_hook_config，如未配置则自动安装
添加配置模式支持：auto（默认，启动配置但不清理）、auto-cleanup（启动配置退出清理）、manual（手动管理）
前端添加 HookConfigStatus 组件显示配置状态
测试: 全新环境启动验证自动配置

tasks.title: Hook 自动清理 - 退出时移除配置
tasks.description: 软件退出时自动清理之前安装的 Hook 配置，恢复原始 settings.json。仅在 auto-cleanup 模式下执行清理。
steps: 实现 uninstall_hooks 命令 - 从 settings.json 中移除 Vibe Island hooks
实现备份恢复逻辑 - 从 .vibe-island-backup 恢复原始配置
在 lib.rs 中注册退出钩子 (on_app_exit)
根据配置模式决定是否执行清理
处理异常情况：备份文件不存在、settings.json 已被用户修改
前端添加配置模式切换 UI
测试: auto-cleanup 模式下退出验证配置清理
